name: XM1014 | 斯康里娅
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. It has been subtly painted with metallic paints. Let's not be hasty: there may be another way to get Valeria's attention... - A Father's Love Part 3
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把武器使用金属涂料进行了细致的涂装。 咱们别草率行事：可能还有另一种方法能够吸引瓦莱里娅的注意…… -《父爱（下）》
